title: ericoides australe
intro: Ericoides australe, also known as Mountain Pepper, is a small, shrub-like plant native to the southeastern regions of Australia. The plant's leaves and stems have been used for centuries in traditional Aboriginal medicine, boasting medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ericoides australe include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and combat microbial infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
